summary: Full backend + frontend testing of 4 bug fixes: drag-drop fix, SEND→/api/emails, chat includes all email refs, WIPE_DB button. All 6 backend tests passed. All frontend flows verified.

ui_bugs.issue: Welcome card still shows 'ACTIVE MODEL: CLAUDE SONNET 4.5 (ANTHROPIC)' but header correctly shows 4.6 — same issue as iteration_3

action_items: Fix welcome card 'ACTIVE MODEL' label from 4.5 to 4.6 in ChatArea component (cosmetic only, persisted from iteration 3)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1364 lines — exceeds 700-line split threshold. Consider extracting EC routes to a separate router.
Grok model still non-functional (no xAI credits) — users selecting Grok will get an error.
seed_data_creation: Email references created during testing — some TEST_ prefixed refs remain in email_references collection. EC jobs wiped during WIPE_DB test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 bug fixes verified working: (1) dragCounter ref prevents flicker on drag events (tested via file upload), (2) SEND button POSTs to /api/emails and switches to chat tab + opens email panel, (3) /api/chat includes all email refs in context, (4) WIPE_DB button deletes all jobs and hides itself after. One outstanding cosmetic issue: ChatArea welcome card still says CLAUDE SONNET 4.5 instead of 4.6.
rca_of_issue: Welcome card model label hardcoded to '4.5' in ChatArea component — needs search/replace to match actual model name from /api/models response.
